'''Koh'shak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and was a member of [[Clan Shak]]. Koh'shak worked for the Twi'lek [[Cazne'olan]], helping handle negotiations for the whereabouts of [[Firith Olan]] between [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Marl Semtin/Legends|Marl Semtin]]. Koh'shak judged a competition between the two factions in which [[Sixtus Quin]] and [[Septaas]] competed against [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. Sixtus won the competition, securing the information about Firith. However, Sixtus' commander, Semtin, had gone above the negotiations, bribing a high-up official on [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]] to get to Firith Olan regardless of the outcome of the competition.

Koh'shak served as the [[Starport Master]] of Kala'uun and posted a bounty for [[Theol Dunoche]], a human freighter captain responsible for the theft of two Twi'lek slave girls.
